name: deploystack
description: Self-hosted zero-downtime deployment system for Next.js apps, triggered by GitHub webhooks.

scripts.lint: node --check src/server.js && node --check src/config.js && node --check src/queue.js && node --check src/deployer.js && node --check src/webhook.js && node --check src/releases.js && node --check src/logger.js && node --check src/status.js && node --check src/cli.js && node --check bin/deploystack && bash -n scripts/deploy.sh && bash -n scripts/rollback.sh && bash -n scripts/lib.sh
